uplink.description: Full profile uplink: 8 soil depths (moisture % + temperature °C) and battery, both sensor blocks present (flags 0x0003)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; per-depth moisture raws chosen so (raw-2500)/500 lands in [0,100] %, temperature raws so (raw-32768)/100 lands at 20-27 °C, battery raw 3600 -> 3.6 V. expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this input and mapping its raw per-depth channels onto the normalized vocabulary (topmost depth -> soil.*, full profile -> camelCase extras).

uplink.description: Battery-only uplink: profile block absent, only the 1-word battery block present (flags 0x0002)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; flags 0x0002 selects only the battery block. expected.data derived from reference/upstream-codec.js (battery raw 3600 -> 3.6 V).

uplink.description: Wrong protocol version byte is rejected
uplink._note: Synthetic error payload; reference/upstream-codec.js returns {error: "protocol version 3 doesn't match v2"} for a non-2 version byte.
